annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Ala. Code § 8-8-1 — 6% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Alabama’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
